name: CodeBlockContentProps
description:
The scrollable body of the code block. Renders pre-highlighted HTML, plain
code, or custom children.

code.description: Raw code, rendered as plain (unhighlighted) text when no `html` is given.

html.description: Pre-highlighted HTML from `highlightCode` — takes precedence over `code`.

showLineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in the gutter.

wrap.description: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.

children.description: Custom-rendered code (e.g. a server-rendered HAST tree) — takes precedence over `html`.
